name: chrY_Yq11_222_AZFa_USP9Y
description: AZFa (Azoospermia Factor a) sub-region of MSY at proximal Yq11.221, ~792 kb containing USP9Y and DDX3Y. Flanked by two ~10 kb HERV-derived direct repeats (HERV15yq1/HERV15yq2) at 94% identity; NAHR between these HERVs causes the recurrent ~792 kb AZFa deletion underlying ~5% of non-obstructive azoospermia.

architecture.internal_structure: Two HERV15 proviruses in direct orientation flanking USP9Y and DDX3Y; recurrent NAHR deletion.
